privileged_info_summary: The implement_annotation_validator task is a synthetic Java programming challenge using a Maven project called 'chinook-validator' located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/chinook-validator. The task contains exactly 14 test methods in ValidatorTest.java that validate an annotation-based validation framework. The framework requires implementing 4 custom annotations (@NotNull, @StringLength, @Range, @Pattern) with Runtime retention and a Validator class that uses Java Reflection API with the methods getDeclaredFields, getAnnotation, setAccessible, and Field. The verifier awards 15 points for compilation, 15 for reflection usage detection, 15 for proper annotation definitions with RUNTIME retention, and 55 points for test passage (scaled: ~3.9 points per passing test out of 14 total).
